title: Sherman's Quilted Pack
description: A large-scale RPG Adventure, based on Modrinth mods and the Quilt mod loader.
body:
# A Pre-configured pack, no keybinds or setup required. Just install and play right away!

*Currently experimental, as a lot of my time is consumed by my main pack currently. This is meant as a solution to the fact that the Modrinth version of my main pack can't really be updated without being completely independent due to being depnedent on a variety of Curse exclusive mods like the FTB mods.*

Currently includes:

🟥 9 new Origins, designed to be simple  
🟧 Dozens of dungeons and structures  
🟨 Weapon tiers, magic, player levels, trinkets, and more RPG elements  
🟩 New hostile mobs including Ghouls, Revenants, and Mutant Mobs  
🟦 Many new bosses across all 3 dimensions  
🟪 Over a dozen new weapon types + tons of unique weapons  
🟫 Yttrium technology (phase through blocks and shoot black holes with a railgun!)  

If you have any comments, suggestions, or noticable bugs, please feel free to message me.
